hero.title: Victus shows you who you become over time.
hero.subtitle: A behavior analytics journal for consistency.

problem_reframe.title_1: Most tools try to push you forward.
problem_reframe.title_2: Victus helps you see where you already are.
problem_reframe.insight: Because what changes behavior isn't intensity — it's clarity over time.

what_it_does.subtitle: Victus turns daily actions into long-term patterns you can actually see.
what_it_does.item_1: Reveals when your habits start to decay
what_it_does.item_2: Shows how you bounce back after breaks

visual_features.card_1_description: See behaviors emerge over weeks and months
visual_features.card_3_description: No streaks, no guilt, no resets
visual_features.card_4_description: See reality, decide what to do with it

for_not_for.title_sub: Not everyone. And that's the point.
for_not_for.for_4: Anyone who prefers data over feelings

core_insight.title: One question Victus makes unavoidable
core_insight.question: Am I actually consistent — or just optimistic?
core_insight.answer_1: Most people never get a real answer.

how_it_works.title: How it works
how_it_works.description: A simple process designed for long-term clarity, not daily pressure.

manifesto.title: The Victus Manifesto
manifesto.line_3: Victus exists to show what usually stays hidden: how you act when no one is watching.

plans.title: Pricing
plans.subtitle: Simple pricing for long-term clarity.
plans.clarity_message: You're not paying for features. You're paying for clarity.

ai_summary.title: Request an AI summary of Victus

footer.work_in_progress: We're working to make this feature available soon!

privacy.title: Privacy Policy
privacy.intro: Victus ("we", "our" or "Jornal Victus") respects your privacy and is committed to protecting your personal data. This privacy policy explains how we collect, use, and protect your information.
privacy.section_1_content: We collect the following data when you use Victus:

section_1_items.item_2: Habit data: habits you create and track
section_1_items.item_3: Usage data: how you interact with the application
section_1_items.item_4: Device information: browser type, operating system

section_2_items.item_1: Provide and maintain the habit tracking service
section_2_items.item_2: Analyze patterns and generate insights about your behaviors
section_2_items.item_3: Improve our service and user experience

privacy.section_3_content: We retain your data as long as your account is active. You can request deletion of your data at any time by contacting us.
privacy.section_4_content: Under the Brazilian General Data Protection Law (LGPD), you have the right to:
privacy.section_5_content: We use essential cookies for authentication and service functionality. We also use analytics tools to understand how users interact with our application.
privacy.section_6_content: We implement technical and organizational security measures to protect your personal data against unauthorized access, alteration, disclosure, or destruction.
privacy.section_7_content: To exercise your rights or ask questions about this policy, contact us:

terms.title: Terms of Use
terms.intro: Welcome to Victus. By accessing or using our service, you agree to these terms of use.
terms.section_1_content: Victus is a behavioral analytics journal that helps you track habits and observe patterns over time. Our service is designed for clarity and reflection, not gamification or pressure.
terms.section_2_content: You are responsible for maintaining the confidentiality of your account and password. You agree to notify us immediately of any unauthorized use of your account.
terms.section_3_content: When using Victus, you agree to:

section_3_items.item_1: Provide accurate information when creating your account
section_3_items.item_2: Use the service only for personal and legal purposes
section_3_items.item_3: Not attempt to access other users' accounts
section_3_items.item_4: Not use the service for illegal or harmful activities

terms.section_4_content: All content, design, and code of Victus are property of Jornal Victus and are protected by copyright laws. Your habit data remains yours.
terms.section_5_content: Victus is provided "as is". We do not guarantee that the service will be uninterrupted or error-free. We are not liable for any indirect damages arising from use of the service.
terms.section_6_content: We reserve the right to modify or discontinue the service at any time, with or without notice.
terms.section_7_content: We may suspend or terminate your account if you violate these terms. You may terminate your account at any time by contacting us.
terms.section_8_content: These terms are governed by the laws of the Federative Republic of Brazil. Any disputes will be resolved in the courts of Sao Paulo, SP.
terms.section_9_content: For questions about these terms, contact us:
